stemHtml: A pilot is approaching his destination airport in IFR in IMC conditions. ATC instructs the pilot to climb but the pilot can not acknowledge or reply. The pilot suspects he has a communication failure. The pilot should…

options.a: Make a low approach and wait for visual signals of the ground personnel.
options.b: Squawk 7700 and continue in accordance with the flight plan.
options.c: Continue to the destination aerodrome, adding 500 ft to all the altitudes in the flight plan.
options.d: Land within 30 minutes after the estimated time of arrival.
